title: MLife Stainless Steel Dog Bowl with Rubber Base for Small and Medium Dogs, Pets Feeder Bowl and Water Bowl Perfect Choice (set of 2) (S)
features: Stainless steel material, polished to a mirror sheen, rust resistant and long lifetime.
Dog bowl rubber base can effectively reduce noise and skidding while your pets eats, also can protect the hardwood floor from scratch.
Each small size bowl holds 2 cup (6oz) food, perfect for dry kibble, wet food, treats or water.
Set of 2 dog bowls, one for water and one for food.
description: Product Description Made of high quality stainless steel, steady material and durable performance will make this dog bowl become your pet’s favorite dish. It offers a healthier alternative to plastic, doesn’t hold odors and bacteria, and helps make mealtimes less messy. Small Size / Medium Size / Large Size Material: Stainless Steel Top Diameter: 5.5 inch / 6.3 inch / 7.9 inch Bottom Diameter: 7 inch / 8.5 inch / 10 inch Height: 1.75 inch / 2 inch / 2.3 inch Capacity: 6 oz / 10 oz / 16 oz -Package Includes: Set of two bowls Three different size bowl fit various of body sizes dogs feeding need, each set includes two same bowls for the convenience of feeding pet food and water, make feeding easier and leave more peace of mind for pet parents. Fitted with a rubber ring on the bottom, no more sliding across the floor, the slip resistant rubber base also helps protect bare and hardwood floors from damage. Premium stainless steel made and less bacteria attached, removable rubber ring will allow you to clean the hidden particles of food, effectively reduce the risk of disease for your pets. Scratch and rust resistant design enable this bowl long-lasting good look and superior performance. Cleans up quickly and easily in the dishwasher. Definitely a reliable and healthy choice for your puppies/ kitties & dogs/cats.
